reasons: Franco can isolate a target so Harley can apply Deadly Magic and stack burst without chasing through a full team.
Harley's single-target burst becomes more reliable when Franco holds the target in place.

proof.summary: Franco isolates or suppresses one target, while Harley converts that isolation into single-target magic burst.
worksBestWhen: Franco catches a priority squishy target.
Harley waits until the target is controlled before committing burst.
failureCases: Franco catches a tank instead of a priority target.
Harley commits before the target is controlled.
Enemy peel blocks Harley's follow-up path.

reasons: Kaja can suppress and drag one target, giving Harley a direct burst window.
Harley can quickly follow Kaja's pickoff with Deadly Magic and Poker Trick before the target escapes.

proof.summary: Kaja locks one target with suppression, while Harley adds burst during the forced-control window.
worksBestWhen: Kaja suppresses a target Harley can immediately reach.
Harley keeps Space Escape available for exit after burst.
failureCases: Harley's burst is blocked or delayed.
Enemy teammates collapse on Harley's return point.

reasons: Selena can prepare vision and stun angles that let Harley commit to a confirmed pickoff.
Harley can burst the target Selena catches before the enemy team fully reacts.

proof.summary: Selena creates scouting and stun opportunities, while Harley follows with fast magic burst on the confirmed target.
worksBestWhen: Selena controls bushes or rotation paths.
Harley follows after a real stun or vision confirmation.
failureCases: The target has cleanse, immunity, or strong peel nearby.

reasons: Mathilda can give Harley extra shield and movement support during his burst dive.
Harley benefits from an additional escape or reposition option after using Space Escape aggressively.

proof.summary: Harley starts the burst play, while Mathilda helps him enter or exit with mobility and shielding support.
worksBestWhen: Mathilda positions close enough for Harley to use the mobility option.
Harley saves at least one escape route after committing.
failureCases: The enemy waits out the shield before counter-engaging.

reasons: Angela can shield and sustain Harley while he commits to a risky burst target.
Her support helps Harley survive the counterattack after he marks and damages a priority target.

proof.summary: Harley supplies the burst, while Angela adds protection and sustain during his commit and escape window.
worksBestWhen: Angela attaches before Harley enters dangerous range.
Harley still keeps an escape route after burst.
failureCases: Harley dives into multiple hard-control heroes.
Harley's target survives and the enemy collapses.
